title: Taking Turns
lesson: Waiting and taking turns means everyone gets a chance to play.
prompts: In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands waving a cheerful hello, with a happy, curious expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06} wave back near the slide ladder, smiling. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, wide eye-level shot, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands on the playground mulch to the left of the slide ladder entrance, raising both hands in surprise, with a slightly surprised expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06} crowd close on the playground mulch to the right of the ladder entrance, each stretching one open hand toward a yellow ladder side rail, eager to climb. All three children have both feet planted on the ground, with the red slide chute and ladder rungs empty behind them. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands in a small inward-facing circle, with a calm, friendly smile, one open hand raised gently as if suggesting everyone wait their turn. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06} stand back from the slide ladder in that inward-facing circle, making small open-hand conversational gestures while looking at the person from the input image with patient, attentive expressions. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, clapping with a cheerful, encouraging expression. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06} slides down the red slide with arms up and a delighted grin, while {GENDER_M_AGE_06} stands beside the slide cheering with an excited smile. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, warm sunlight, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits alone at the bottom of the slide having just slid down, beaming with a joyful smile. They are the only person in the frame. Photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a cheerful sunny playground beside a small red slide, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, raising their joined hands high in celebration, with a big happy smile. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_06} and {GENDER_M_AGE_06} stand together laughing and playing happily, all three holding hands in a row. Make the interaction read physically: each person faces the other person or the shared object, with hands and gaze directed to one connected action. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
negative_prompts: child standing on slide, child standing on ladder, feet on ladder rung, feet on slide chute, child blocking slide chute, child climbing the slide chute
gists: At a sunny playground by a small red slide, the child waves hello while two friends, a girl and a boy, wave back near the slide ladder — the child arrives to play.
By the red slide, the child raises both hands in surprise as the two friends crowd in, all reaching for the slide ladder at once — it's too crowded, nobody can climb.
By the red slide, the child raises one hand calmly suggesting they wait their turn while the two friends stand back and discuss the idea with patient, attentive expressions.
By the red slide, the child claps and cheers as the girl slides down with arms up and the boy cheers beside the slide — a friend takes the first turn.
By the red slide, the child sits alone at the bottom of the slide having just slid down, beaming — it's the child's turn and they enjoy it.
By the red slide in golden light, the child and the two friends hold hands in a row, all happy — everyone got a turn and had fun.
texts: {NAME} came to the playground and saw a shiny red slide. Two friends were there too. "Let's play!" said {NAME}, waving hello.
But everyone rushed to the ladder at once — even {NAME}! "Hey, I can't climb!" said the boy. It was far too crowded, and nobody could go up.
"Let's take turns," said {NAME} gently, raising a hand. "Good idea," said the girl, and the friends stepped back and nodded.
One friend slid down first — wheee! "Go, go, go!" cheered {NAME}, clapping. "That was so fast!" laughed the girl.
Then it was {NAME}'s turn. "Here I go!" Down {NAME} zoomed to the bottom with a great big smile.
Everyone got a turn, and everyone had fun. "That was the best!" said {NAME}. They all held hands, as happy as can be. Taking turns means everyone gets to play.
